data.body: Resolved upstream before this change was pushed. Commit f2e4247a1 ("tests: align hierarchy schema fixture with review phase") applied the identical fix — adding review_phase to the old_shape fixture — and origin/main HEAD 7cec0f64c is now green (test_plan_review_hierarchy_incomplete.py: 12 passed). No separate change needed; closing as resolved-elsewhere/duplicate. Root-cause note retained here: the red landed via the Rebase-If-Necessary hazard (change 889 earned Verified+1 on a pre-test base, then merged server-side without re-running CI against the conflicting old_shape fixture).
